title: Our Partners
text:
NLR partners with commercial and noncommercial organizations, including national security and defense, to accelerate the movement of advanced energy technologies into practical applications.
As the nation's leading energy systems laboratory, NLR seeks partners to help develop, integrate, and deploy energy solutions worldwide.
Commercial and Industrial Partnerships
Learn about NLR's work with partners in the manufacturing, chemical, power, and aviation sectors.
Public Agency and Nonprofit Partnerships
Learn how NLR supports federal agencies, state and local governments, international communities, and foundations.
National Security and Defense Partnerships
NLR and U.S. national security and defense partners work to understand threats to energy security.
